title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Kanpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Greaves Cotton Consulting Pvt Ltd!
